demo.title: gmfarcaster-query.sh
demo.code:
# One-time: deps + a wallet holding USDC on Base (no ETH needed)
pip install -r scripts/requirements.txt
export GMFARCASTER_PRIVATE_KEY=0x...

# Ask the GM Farcaster archive anything — pays ~$0.005 USDC via x402
python scripts/query.py "What have the hosts said about prediction markets?"

# Returns a grounded answer + timestamped episode links
python scripts/query.py "Which episodes covered the Clanker Ecosystem Fund?"

setup: No signup, no API key — payment via x402 is the authorization (~$0.005 USDC per query on Base)
Payments are pinned: the script only pays a 402 challenge matching Base USDC, GM Farcaster's wallet, and max $0.005 — anything else is refused before signing
Set `GMFARCASTER_PRIVATE_KEY` to a dedicated low-balance wallet holding USDC on Base (gasless for the signer — no ETH needed)
Run `python scripts/query.py "your question"` — answers are live-generated and can take up to a few minutes
